scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web -- --mode desktop
scripts.start:desktop: npm run bundle:desktop && npm run start -w desktop
scripts.package:win: npm run bundle:desktop && npm install -w desktop && npm run dist -w desktop
